# claudeadmin_service_account_workspaces (Data Source)

Lists all workspace memberships for a service account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_service_account_workspaces" "ci_workspaces" {
  service_account_id = "svac_01SDCCSbTxrXDpWc1phhtcfK"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_account_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `implicit` (Boolean)
- `service_account_id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
- `workspace_role` (String)
